name: Investment Advisory Committee
summary:
• Receive a report from Meeder Investments.
  • Receive a report on short-term investments from City Treasurer.
  • Create a subcommittee to consider the performance of investments that are outsourced and managed internally.

name: Housing and Human Services Committee
summary:
• Discussion/action to finalize HHSC Work Plan for 2026-2028
  • Presentation on home sharing programs and discussion whether committee should research it for consideration as a recommended program.
  • Special presentation from Alejandra Perez Matus. Kennedy Commission, on their interactive Community Profile Navigation Tool regarding affordable housing

name: Parking, Traffic, and Circulation Committee
summary:
• Request to Evaluate Additional Traffic Safety Measures nearby 484 Nyes Place. The Committee considered a request to (1) trim the overgrown vegetation to restore the visibility of the existing roadside signs, (2) evaluate the street bend at this location for additional traffic safety measures, (3) evaluate the appropriateness of a 'red-light' flashing beacon on the existing stop sign; and (4) implement additional pavement markings or reflective striping around the stop sign adjacent to 484 Nyes Place.
    📍 Google Maps🗺️ City GIS
  • Request to Relocate Loma Terrace No Parking Sign. The Committee will consider a request to relocate the existing 'No Parking' sign on the east side of Loma Terrace, currently located adjacent to 328 Loma Terrace, to a location approximately 165 feet north of the intersection of Loma Terrace and Y Place, adjacent to 308 Loma Terrace.
    📍 Google Maps🗺️ City GIS
  • Request to Install Parking Restrictions along the 100 Block of Fairview Street. The Committee will consider a request to install additional parking restrictions on Fairview Street to discourage vehicles blocking the residential driveways, improve turning movements at intersections for trash collection services and emergency vehicles, and improve visibility.
    📍 Google Maps🗺️ City GIS
